# Amazon Bedrock User Guide - Document History (Complete Changelog)

## Latest Update
**February 27, 2026**

---

## All Documented Changes (Most Recent First)

### February 2026
- **Converse API support for batch inference** (Feb 27, 2026): Use Converse API format for batch inference input data with consistent request format across models
- **Fine-tuning open-weight models with OpenAI APIs** (Feb 17, 2026): Create, monitor, and manage reinforcement fine-tuning jobs through OpenAI SDK endpoints (Files API, fine-tuning jobs APIs, inference APIs)

### December 2025 - January 2026
- **Service tier model support updates** (Dec 31, 2025): Updated list of models for priority and flex service tiers
- **Blueprint instruction optimization** (Dec 18, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Data Automation supports document blueprint instruction optimization with ground truth labels
- **New managed IAM policies** (Dec 3, 2025):
  - AmazonBedrockMantleFullAccess
  - AmazonBedrockMantleReadOnly
  - AmazonBedrockMantleInferenceAccess
- **OpenAI compatible API endpoints** (Dec 3, 2025): Amazon Bedrock Mantle provides OpenAI-compatible endpoints including Responses API and Chat Completions API for asynchronous inference
- **Reinforcement fine-tuning** (Dec 3, 2025): New reinforcement fine-tuning feature to improve foundation model performance
- **Reserved service tier** (Nov 26, 2025): New "Reserved" service tier for Bedrock inference
- **Claude Opus 4.5 support** (Nov 24, 2025): New Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 model available
- **Cross-account Guardrails sharing** (Nov 21, 2025): Share guardrails across AWS accounts

### Additional Documented Changes (2025)
- **BDA Synchronous Invocation** (Nov 21, 2025): Direct API invocation capability for Data Automation
- **Guardrails Enhanced Coding Support** (Nov 19, 2025): Better code handling in Standard tier
- **Priority/Flex Service Tiers** (Nov 18, 2025): New on-demand inference options
- **Token Count Estimation** (Oct 31, 2025): Estimate tokens for some models
- **Default Model Access** (Oct 15, 2025): All foundation models enabled by default with IAM
- **Flows Enhancement** (Sep 26, 2025): Trace improvements and DoWhile loops
- **OpenAI Batch API Support** (Aug 27, 2025): Native support for OpenAI batch API
- **Token Counting** (Aug 21, 2025): Estimate token usage
- **Automated Reasoning Checks** (Aug 5, 2025): Guardrails validation of response accuracy
- **Custom Model On-Demand Inference** (Jul 16, 2025): Deploy custom models for pay-per-token
- **API Keys** (Jul 7, 2025): Create API keys for authentication
- **Guardrails Safeguard Tiers** (Jun 23, 2025): Performance and language options
- **Flow Executions** (Jun 19, 2025): Run flows for longer durations (preview)
- **Inline Code Nodes in Flows** (Jun 19, 2025): Run code directly in flows (preview)
- **Guardrails Cross-Region** (May 13, 2025): Cross-region inference support
- **Intelligent Prompt Routing GA** (Apr 25, 2025): General availability
- **Flow Templates** (Mar 27, 2025): Pre-built flow templates
- **Guardrails IAM Condition** (Mar 18, 2025): Enforce specific guardrails via IAM

## Note
Last fetched: 2026-04-15. No new entries since February 27, 2026.
